description: Missing stratum — one stratum (ECOG=0, Male) is dropped from the stratified log-rank analysis without justification. Stratum counts don't sum to total.

TC-003.note: NOTE: Strata sum is 150 but total N is 200. The stratum ECOG=0, Male (N=50) is missing. No explanation provided.

detection_expectation.rule_violated: R-COUNT-04 / N-004: cross-stratum N must sum to total
detection_expectation.correct_action: Flag missing stratum: 3 strata listed sum to 150, not 200. ECOG=0, Male stratum (N=50) excluded without justification.

metadata.notes: Stratum may be accidentally filtered due to zero events or programming error. Must be documented if excluded.
